profile.terms.title: Terms of Use
profile.terms.subtitle: View the app terms of use
profile.terms.intro: Welcome to the appointments management app. Your use of the app and related services is subject to the terms detailed in this document and constitutes full and informed consent to all its provisions.
profile.terms.section1.title: 1. Account Creation and Identification
profile.terms.section1.body: To use the services, you may be required to provide identifying information such as name and phone number. You declare that the information provided is accurate and up to date and will update it as needed. Do not use another person's details without their permission.
profile.terms.section2.title: 2. Booking and Changes
profile.terms.section2.body: Booking, changes, or cancellation are done through the app subject to availability. The confirmed appointment details will be displayed in the app and sent as a notification per settings. Service times are approximate and may change due to operational constraints.
profile.terms.section3.title: 3. Cancellations and No-Shows
profile.terms.section3.body: You may cancel or change an appointment within a reasonable time before its scheduled time. No-shows or significant delays may result in future restrictions on booking, at the business's discretion.
profile.terms.section4.title: 4. Payments and Receipts
profile.terms.section4.body: If payment is made through the app, it may be processed via third-party payment providers. Payment method details are not stored on our servers beyond what is necessary to complete the transaction. If payment is made at the business, it will be settled directly between you and the business.
profile.terms.section5.title: 5. Notifications and Messaging
profile.terms.section5.body: You can enable or disable notifications from the app or through device settings. Disabling notifications may affect receiving reminders and important updates.
profile.terms.section6.title: 6. Privacy and Data Security
profile.terms.section6.body: We may collect and process information necessary to operate the service, including basic identification information and appointment data. Information is stored and processed in accordance with applicable law and the privacy policy. You may contact us to review, update, or delete personal information, subject to our legal obligations.
profile.terms.section7.title: 7. Permitted Use and Conduct
profile.terms.section7.body: Do not use the service in a way that infringes on others' rights, violates the law, or disrupts app operations. We may limit or block access in cases of misuse or violation of these terms.
profile.terms.section8.title: 8. Intellectual Property
profile.terms.section8.body: All rights in the app, including name, logo, designs, content, code, and images, are reserved by their owners. Do not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written permission.
profile.terms.section9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
profile.terms.section9.body: The service is provided as-is and as available. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages or loss of profits arising from use of the app. You are solely responsible for use and for content you submit.
profile.terms.section10.title: 10. Availability and Service Changes
profile.terms.section10.body: There may be interruptions, malfunctions, or maintenance work. We may update, change, or discontinue the service, in whole or in part, from time to time.
profile.terms.section11.title: 11. Third Parties
profile.terms.section11.body: The app may include links to or services from third parties, such as payment or messaging services. We are not responsible for those sites or services, and their terms will apply to your use of them.
profile.terms.section12.title: 12. Use by Minors
profile.terms.section12.body: If you are not of legal age under applicable law, app use requires consent from a parent or legal guardian.
profile.terms.section13.title: 13. Updating the Terms
profile.terms.section13.body: We may update these terms from time to time. Publishing an updated version in the app constitutes notice of change. Continued use after the update constitutes consent to the updated text.
profile.terms.section14.title: 14. Contact
profile.terms.section14.body: For questions, issues, or requests regarding these terms or the service, you can contact us using the business contact details shown in the app.

support.header: Need help? Contact Tori's support team
support.description: Our dedicated support team is here to assist you with any questions or issues you may have. Whether you need help with appointments, account settings, or technical support, we're ready to help. Please use the contact button below to reach out to us directly.

calendarAdd.choiceTitle: What would you like to add?

calendarAdd.optionAppointmentHint: Book a client by service and time

calendarAdd.optionConstraintsHint: Block time on the schedule — clients cannot book in that window

appointmentsAdmin.emptySubtitle: Choose another day from the top bar
appointmentsAdmin.cancelMessage: This will free the time and remove the client details for the selected appointment.

appointmentsAdmin.deleteMessage: This will permanently remove the appointment. This action cannot be undone.

appointmentsAdmin.smartRemoveMessageFuture: This appointment is still upcoming. The slot will be freed so someone else can book it.

appointmentsAdmin.pickDate: Select the date for this appointment

hoursAdmin.title: Work constraints
hoursAdmin.subtitle: Set your weekly working schedule and breaks
hoursAdmin.breakHint: Choose the number of minutes to add between appointments. 0 keeps no fixed break.

hoursAdmin.pickDateRangeAllDay: Pick a date range (closed all day)
hoursAdmin.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time
hoursAdmin.constraintConflictsWithAppointments: There are already client appointments in this time range. Cancel or move those appointments first, then you can add this block.
hoursAdmin.constraintsModalSubtitle: Block booking slots when you are unavailable
hoursAdmin.whatToBlock: What do you want to block?

modeHint.hours: Block a time window on one day
modeHint.singleDay: Closed all day — pick one date
modeHint.multiDays: Pick start and end — every day in between is closed

hoursAdmin.rangeHelp: First tap: start date. Second tap: end date.
hoursAdmin.reasonHelper: For your reference only — helps you remember why this block exists.
hoursAdmin.emptyListHint: Saved blocks appear here so you can remove them anytime.

hours.title: Working hours
hours.subtitle: Set your weekly working schedule and breaks

hours.saveBreakFailed: Failed to save break. Please try again.

error.sendFailed: Failed to send notification. Please try again.

waitlist.title: Waitlist
waitlist.loadFailed: An error occurred while loading the weekly waitlist
waitlist.callPrompt: Would you like to call this client?
waitlist.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this entry?
waitlist.deleteFailed: An error occurred while deleting the entry
waitlist.emptySubtitle: When clients join the waitlist, they will appear here.

waitlist.subtitleMonth: Monthly — tap a day to open the list
waitlist.emptyWeekSubtitle: No clients are waiting in this date range

swap.title: Swap Appointment
swap.selectDaysHint: Select the days you would like to swap to
swap.selectTimeRangeHint: Choose the hours you prefer for the swap
swap.selectAtLeastOneDay: Please select at least one day
swap.invalidTimeRange: End time must be after start time
swap.requestCreated: Your swap request has been created. We will notify you when a match is found!
swap.opportunitiesSubtitle: Clients looking to swap times with you
swap.confirmMessage: Swap your appointment on {{myDate}} at {{myTime}} with the appointment on {{theirDate}} at {{theirTime}}?
swap.infoText: When a client with a matching slot confirms the swap once, appointments update. You get a notification with your new time — no extra approval step on your side.

interested.title: Swap interest
interested.subOne: One client wants your appointment slot
interested.banner: Pick who to swap with — both of you get a notification and your new time

notification.title: Appointment swapped
notification.body: Your appointment on {{fromDate}} at {{fromTime}} was swapped. Your new appointment is on {{toDate}} at {{toTime}}.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Track income, expenses, and send reports
finance.deleteExpenseConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?
finance.priceNote: Income is calculated using current service prices

greenInvoice.helpHint: Sign in with your Morning email and password inside the app, create an API key on their site, then paste once — no external browser required.
greenInvoice.cardSummary: One-time setup with a Morning API key. Below: pick a completed appointment and issue a receipt.
greenInvoice.devModeHint: Routes Green Invoice to the test API — demo documents only. Use API keys from a Morning sandbox account.
greenInvoice.oauthLimitNote: Morning does not offer app OAuth yet; after you sign in on their site you still need to create an API key (Best plan or higher). If they add OAuth, we will update this flow.
greenInvoice.connectionVerified: Connection OK — Green Invoice accepted these credentials.
greenInvoice.pastePlaceholder:
Line 1: key ID (UUID)
Line 2: secret key
greenInvoice.pasteInvalid: Could not parse two values. Paste ID on the first line and secret on the second, or two tab-separated values.
greenInvoice.openHelp: How to create an API key
greenInvoice.disconnectConfirmMessage: Remove this connection? You can connect again with a new key.
greenInvoice.comingSoon: You can issue a receipt for a completed appointment in the section below.

receipt.sectionSubtitle: Pick a confirmed or completed appointment in the month shown above (same as income breakdown), then issue a receipt.
receipt.listScrollHint: Scroll the list to see all appointments
receipt.sandboxServerNote: Dev mode (demo documents only): Morning sandbox account + API key (https://www.greeninvoice.co.il/help-center/settings/development-tool). In Supabase → Edge Functions → Secrets set GREEN_INVOICE_USE_SANDBOX=true (project-wide; greeninvoice-connect and greeninvoice-issue-receipt both read it). Sandbox API base: https://sandbox.d.greeninvoice.co.il/api — docs: https://www.greeninvoice.co.il/api-docs
receipt.noCompletedInMonth: No confirmed/completed appointments this month, or the service has no price — a receipt needs an amount.
receipt.successBody: The document was created in Green Invoice.
receipt.sandboxBadge: Sandbox mode — this document was created in the test environment only.

errors.edge_function_not_deployed: A Green Invoice Edge Function is not deployed (404). Deploy: supabase functions deploy greeninvoice-connect and supabase functions deploy greeninvoice-issue-receipt.
errors.invoke_network: Could not reach the server. Try again.
errors.forbidden_not_admin: Only the business admin can connect Green Invoice.
errors.missing_credentials: API key ID and secret are required.
errors.missing_caller_context: No logged-in user detected. Sign out and sign in again.
errors.forbidden_wrong_business: User does not belong to this business. Sign in again.
errors.appointment_not_found: Appointment not found or not in this business.
errors.appointment_not_completed: Only confirmed or completed appointments can receive a receipt.
errors.appointment_price_unknown: Could not determine the service price — update the service catalog.
errors.receipt_already_issued: A receipt was already issued for this appointment.
